## Test plan

## Checklist

- [ ] Conventional Commits title + commit messages
- [ ] `dart format`, `flutter analyze`, `flutter test` pass locally
- [ ] Codegen is in sync (`dart run build_runner build --delete-conflicting-outputs`, no diff)
- [ ] **Tests added** for new behaviour / repository / use-case methods — or _why not_:
  <!-- If no tests, state the reason here. Reviewer must agree to waive. -->
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or credentials committed
- [ ] User-facing strings localised in `lib/l10n/` (if any)
